description_long: This is a high-top urban sneaker featuring a brown leather upper with visible stitching and a contrasting dark heel counter. The shoe has a padded collar lined with light green fabric for comfort and ankle support. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and standard criss-cross laces, with a branded patch on the tongue and a small leather tag on the side. The midsole is white and flat, providing a modern, casual look, while the outsole is black and appears to be made of rubber. The shoe's design includes both functional and decorative elements, such as reinforced stitching and a pull tab at the heel. Overall, it combines durability with style, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A brown high-top sneaker with a padded green collar, white midsole, and dark heel counter, featuring criss-cross laces and branded details. The shoe blends leather and textile materials for comfort and urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, criss-cross laces, and branded tongue patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown leather upper, side stitching, branded leather tag, and white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded green collar, dark heel counter, and pull tab.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuous brown leather upper, stitching details, and white midsole.
attribute_logo: circular logo on tongue, small leather patch on side, both in dark color
